query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schedule_adherence (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  work_order_number VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  data_center VARCHAR(255),
  lock_week VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  submitted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_lock_week (lock_week),
  INDEX idx_reason (reason),
  INDEX idx_submitted_at (submitted_at)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LTmfYgwcE1mg9cB.root --database Jdx475rzuNGCt88odzGLDy --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schedule_adherence (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  work_order_number VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  data_center VARCHAR(255),
  lock_week VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  submitted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_lock_week (lock_week),
  INDEX idx_reason (reason),
  INDEX idx_submitted_at (submitted_at)
);
